channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: OpenAI can't 'make operational decisions' on military's use of tech, CEO says
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees that the company doesn't "get to make operational decisions" about how its AI technology is used by the Pentagon,...

item.title: WATCH: David Muir shares details about new Elephant Valley exhibit at San Diego Zoo
item.description: Designed to make visitors feel like they're walking alongside the elephants, it's the largest project in the zoo's 109-year history.

item.title: Attempted suicides, fights, pain: 911 calls reveal misery at ICE’s largest detention facility
item.description: The calls to 911 poured in from staff at Camp East Montana, the nation’s largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility, in its f...

item.title: Trump says U.S. and Israel intend to "go in and clean out" Iran regime
item.description: With the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran in its seventh day, Trump says the aim is to "go in and clean out everything," suggesting a regime change objective.

item.title: Mom whose son was killed by ICE doesn't blame Trump, but calls for change
item.description: "I just want to know what happened," Rachel Reyes told CBS News during her first TV interview since the death of her son, Ruben Ray Martinez, a U.S. c...

item.title: Jobs report expected to show hiring slowdown
item.description: The fresh data is set to arrive as the Iran War roils markets.

item.title: Daylight saving time is almost here. Here's what to know.
item.description: The time change known as daylight savings is set to start for 2026, meaning most Americans will lose an hour of sleep when they "spring forward" on Su...

item.title: Iran live updates: Ukraine drone specialists going to Middle East to defend US bases
item.description: President Donald Trump called upon the Iranian Revolutionary Guard, military and police to "lay down their arms" against the U.S. and Israel.

item.title: People love to hate changing clocks twice a year, but can’t agree how to fix it
DOJ releases previously withheld FBI reports about allegation against Trump
item.description: The DOJ has released three previously withheld FBI interview reports from 2019 related to a woman who made uncorroborated allegations against Presiden...

item.title: U.S. plans to exhume and identify remains of 88 Pearl Harbor sailors
item.description: The USS Arizona sank just nine minutes after being bombed, and its 1,177 dead account for nearly half the servicemen killed in the attack.

item.title: Trump says he must have a role in choosing Iran's next leader as war expands
item.description: President Trump said he must have a role in choosing Iran's next leader and called the son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei "unacceptable."

item.title: Man charged in Utah killings wanted victims’ cars and money to get home, prosecutors allege
